description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:edge Docker image, caches the _ccache directory for ccache, and defines two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build-meson job that first runs the global before_script commands (mkdir -p _ccache, export CCACHE_BASEDIR=${PWD}, export CCACHE_DIR=${PWD}/_ccache), then installs python3, gtk+3.0-dev, vala, meson, ninja, libxkbcommon-dev, libcanberra, libgweather4-dev, libgtop-dev, build-base, gobject-introspection-dev, git and py3-pip via apk, runs meson bld --prefix=/usr && cd bld, and finally runs ninja install, publishing any bld/meson-dist/vala-panel*.tar.xz files as artifacts that expire in one week. In the release stage add a release-main job that also runs the global before_script, runs only for tag pipelines, installs python3 via apk, installs the gitlab_release Python package with pip3, and executes python3 -m gitlab_release ${PRIVATE_TOKEN} build/vala-panel*.tar.xz to upload the built tarball to a GitLab release.
